owner_request: Clean the public publication content so it does not expose private planning material, future-plan copy, promotional claims, or private-repo-only content, and keep it tightly related to v0.6.2.

public_repo.final_tag_target_policy: After this receipt is committed and pushed, v0.6.2 should point to the pushed commit that contains both cleanup content and this receipt.

constraints.uncertainty: Published content may expose non-public planning source names or local-only state.
constraints.constraint: Current release-facing public copy and legacy public fixtures must not contain non-public planning doc names, local user paths, internal planning refs, or uncommitted-worktree state.
constraints.audit: public surface grep over README.md, ROADMAP.md, release/v0.6.2, selected legacy docs, and selected legacy fixtures
constraints.rollback: revert the cleanup content commit and restore the previous published public surface

constraints.uncertainty: README could dilute v0.6.2 with older release themes, future plans, or promotional copy.
constraints.constraint: README is restricted to the v0.6.2 Context Health Doctor public surface, current artifacts, and explicit non-claims.
constraints.rollback: revert README.md to the prior public copy if the cleanup is withdrawn

constraints.uncertainty: Release copy could overstate read-only behavior because Context Health Doctor writes generated artifacts.
constraints.constraint: Release copy must say it does not modify scanned source files and writes generated CtxVault artifacts only under chosen output and rollback paths.
constraints.rollback: revert or supersede unsafe release copy

constraints.uncertainty: Package or outreach work could be inferred from the public release.
constraints.constraint: Package publication and external outreach remain explicitly unperformed unless a separate receipt approves and records them.
constraints.rollback: delete or supersede any package or outreach claim if introduced without a receipt

verification.focused_tests: python3 -m pytest tests/test_v061_downstream_oss_publication_lane.py tests/test_v062_public_surface_cleanup.py tests/test_context_health_doctor.py tests/test_cli.py tests/test_v041_projection_governance_kernel.py -> 46 passed
verification.public_surface_grep: rg over README.md, ROADMAP.md, release/v0.6.2, selected legacy docs, and selected legacy fixtures for private planning markers and future-plan markers -> no matches

post_receipt_publication_steps: Run tests after the receipt commit.
Move v0.6.2 to the pushed cleanup receipt commit.
Update the GitHub Release body from release/v0.6.2/github-release.md.
Verify public main, v0.6.2, and GitHub Release body after publication.
